productDisplayName: Puma Men Solid Grey Knits Panel Shorts
description: Composition Grey and navy blue knit panel shorts made of 100% cotton, has an elasticated waist with a drawstring on the inside, two side pockets, embroidered puma Leaping cat on the left thigh and a pocket at the back right Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Designed for the sporty soul, this pair of shorts from puma is crafted from soft and absorbant cotton fabric that offers exemplary comfort. The comfortable elasticated waistband sits snug, while you can further customise the fit with the drawstring. Slip into these shorts when blazing the trail or on casual day and revel in heavenly comfort. Model statistics Product is of length 46 cm on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
